# Rosalind Problem: Find All Approximate Occurrences of a Pattern in a String

## Problem Description
Given strings `Pattern` and `Text`, and an integer `d`, find all occurrences of `Pattern` in `Text` with at most `d` mismatches.

## Solution in Haskell

```haskell
-- Function to calculate Hamming distance between two strings
hammingDistance :: String -> String -> Int
hammingDistance xs ys = sum [1 | (x, y) <- zip xs ys, x /= y]

-- Function to find all approximate occurrences of pattern in text
findAllApproximateOccurrences :: String -> String -> Int -> [Int]
findAllApproximateOccurrences pattern text d = 
    [i | i <- [0..length text - length pattern], 
         hammingDistance (take (length pattern) (drop i text)) pattern <= d]

-- Main function to solve the problem
solve :: String -> String -> Int -> [Int]
solve pattern text d = findAllApproximateOccurrences pattern text d

-- Example usage
main :: IO ()
main = do
    let pattern = "ATTCTGAA"
    let text = "
